tasks.label: Git Push
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m "Redesign + HLX Assistant + plugin data rebuild" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Git Push
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m 'Redesign + HLX Assistant + plugin data rebuild'; git push origin main

tasks.label: Git Commit n Push
tasks.command: Write-Host Starting; git add -A; Write-Host Staged; git commit -m 'Redesign HLX v2'; Write-Host Committed; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Deploy + Push
tasks.command: Write-Host Deploying; npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; Write-Host Pushing; git add -A; git commit -m 'Remove category tabs, keep only Win/Mac platform filter'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Deploy + Push
tasks.command: Write-Host Fixing; npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Fix: preset.html redirect to product.html, all cards use unified product page'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Deploy n Push
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Fix: remove broken preset redirect from product.html, unified product page'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Retry Deploy
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true

tasks.label: Deploy n Push
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Replace torrent links with direct Gofile/Pixeldrain, add new PS and Substance entries'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Quick Deploy Fix
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Fix critical: stray bracket breaking plugin data load'; git push origin main

tasks.label: Final Deploy
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Add admin plugin upload wizard, 18 missing AE plugins, settings link'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Deploy + Push
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Admin edit/delete for plugins and presets on product page and card views'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Deploy + Push
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Fix: persist deleted product IDs in localStorage to survive static data reloads'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done

tasks.label: Deploy + Push
tasks.command: npx.cmd wrangler pages deploy . --project-name zyrexweb --branch main --commit-dirty=true; git add -A; git commit -m 'Admin wizard now publishes live via API + local persistence for instant visibility'; git push origin main; Write-Host Done
